examples: In the evening, the Marionette studied by lamplight.
Her cheeks glowed red in the lamplight.
We drank tea by lamplight in his sparsely furnished house.
The lamplight was warm, the curtains drawn, the leather and mahogany dark.
"To blow the bridge is nothing, " Golz had said, the lamplight on his scarred, shaved head, pointing with a pencil on the big map.
